free_text: D(polarized) + alpha scattering from 12 to 17 MeV
Gas target was operated at room temperature
and in a pressure range of 250-310 torr
The 17 and 150 um detectors used to perform
deltaE-E mass identification of the alpha-particles
and simultaneously used the 150 and 1500 um detectors
Compared with curves from phase shift analysis
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases.
SD: SF9=EXP deleted from REACTION code.
The relative errors in the analyzing powers
are a quadratic combination of the error due to
counting statistics and an additional relative error
